name: confirmEmployeeSelection
description: Call this to confirm and store a selected employee as the ticket requester. Use in these cases: (1) user taps Select button — hidden_content has emp_selected::, pass the employee_id; (2) user verbally selects from a list e.g. 'first one', 'second', 'the one from Marketing', 'yes', 'ok', 'continue' — pass selection_index or department_hint; (3) user gives an employee ID directly — pass employee_id. Never call getTicketSummary() yourself — this function instructs the LLM to do it.

employee_id.description: The employee ID if directly known from hidden_content or user input. e.g. EMP002

selection_index.description: 0-based index of the employee in the last shown list. Use 0 for first, 1 for second, 2 for third.

department_hint.description: Department name if user said something like 'the one from Marketing' or 'the Marketing one'.
